parsed_review.summary:
CP00-713 is a descriptor-only closeout pack extending RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P07 "Permission And Audit Binding" failure/compensation tail (RP23.P07.M05.S05-S14, 10 units, risk A). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the descriptor-only production_ready claim is fully supported and no boundary is breached:

1. Binding (packages/finance-integrations/src/registry.js:324) matches baseline exactly: risk A, 10 units, S05-S14, upstream CP00-712, next CP00-714 / RP23.P07.M05.S15.
2. Requirements (registry.js:2887) match the prompt distributions: deliverable_counts {failure_recovery:8, security_audit:1, implementation:1}; micro_title_row_counts {"Permission And Audit Binding":10}; required_section_rows lists the 10 expected failure/expectation titles.
3. Coverage + descriptor validators (validators.js:7-8) enforce risk/unit/first/last drift checks, RP23-only units, no duplicates, descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, no raw/financial/credential payloads, no bank/card/WEHAGO/Douzone/tax/DART runtime-open flags, no permission-decision detail, no cross-tenant access, no audit event body, no real financial data, Hermes/Claude gate integrity, and handoff continuity.
4. Authority boundary (descriptor + contract latest_projection at contracts/external-integrations-ii-contract.json:24514) keeps claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-714.
5. No-write attestation (registry.js:341) carries comprehensive false flags including emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, writes_product_state=false, evaluates_runtime_permission=false, writes_audit_event=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true.
6. Tests (test/model.test.js:54-56) cover CP713 binding/coverage, runtime-closed descriptor/packets (runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-714, hermes emits_runtime_receipt=false, claude read_only=true, handoff to CP00-714), and contract projection as latest with CP694-712 preserved historical.
7. Contract regenerated by scripts/validate-rp23-external-integrations-ii-contract.mjs with CP00-713 as current/latest_pack and latest_projection, validation.valid=true; CP00-694..712 historical.
8. Plan (docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json) live_state=CP00-713 with forward queue beginning CP00-714/RP23.P07.M05.S15 (no gap/overlap); README#cp00-713 and package.json validation scripts all present and consistent.
9. Hermes control-plane pattern used only for the deterministic evidence packet (receipt_shape descriptor_only_finance_integrations_no_write), not product runtime; hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false holds.
10. Review hardening satisfied: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1434-byte valid JSON result, no auth/usage error), forbidden_review_evidence enumerated (not_logged_in, malformed_json, usage_limit_error, permission_denial, write_tool_used, runtime_receipt_claim), tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob.
11. No overclaim: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status in_progress; construction-inspection and claude-review-result correctly in pending_review pre-state awaiting exactly this receipt. No-leak grep over src found only safe false-valued guards (no real credentials/secrets/financial data/runtime-open flags).

The pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim, so the human-final-approval authority boundary is correctly outside this receipt and does not block goal closeout. Command/test/Hermes execution results are taken from the recorded docs/closeout-packs/cp00-713/command-evidence.json (all exit 0; not re-run under read-only constraints), and are corroborated by independent source inspection of the descriptor-only, no-write, runtime-closed, Claude-non-final boundaries. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues found.
